title: Standard Interview of Evidence Use (SIEU)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"95jie","text":" This is a modification of Palinkas' SIEU - we removed items 16-20 because they were not appropriate for an educational setting","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"82o15","text":"We also changed language to be more consistent with educational terminology (e.g., Agency changed to School Distrct)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5kgci","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"15u2l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
